summary: Mutual NDA between JATO Dynamics Limited and MANTARAV DIGITAL INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONSULTANCY for the purpose of discussing and evaluating JATO's products/services. Covers protection and handling of confidential information exchanged for this purpose.
assumptions: Assumed 'JATO' and 'Customer' refer to the two detailed corporate entities named in the signature block.

Purpose is explicitly stated in the text.
Date 2026-02-09 is treated as the effective date/signature date.
Input may contain concentrated personal data. Review output handling carefully.
